failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Regular maintenance and inspection of BPR valve

failure_modes.cause: Inadequate heat dissipation at high reaction temperatures
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure efficient heat exchange and monitor temperature closely

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform a flow test with simulated debris to assess BPR valve blockage risk
Conduct thermal profiling of the reaction mixture to ensure temperature stability
